name: Chicken Ala Can-Can
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced or chopped chicken, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the French onion rings in a casserole dish.
2. Place the dish in an oven preheated to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Bake for 7 minutes.
4. Sprinkle the French onion rings on top.
5. Continue baking for another 7 minutes until the chicken is cooked through and the onions are caramelized.
